title: Invoice
description: Invoice model for the payment clock (PR 2a holiday core + PR 2b statutory clock). Sources read from in-repo goldens only; no numeric confidence/risk scores; no tier-3 data (no TIN/SSN/DOB).

received_date.description: Proper-invoice received date; consumed by the payment clock (engine/payment_clock.py PaymentClock.invoice_due_dates).

net_terms_days.description: Operational term length in days (a count, not a score). Fed to the payment clock (engine/payment_clock.py); pure day-count is confident, holiday-adjusted is attorney-gated.

invoice_received_date.description: §179-e(6)(a): date the proper invoice was actually received at the designated payment office. One input to the MIR later-of.

goods_received_date.description: §179-e(6)(b): date the agency received the goods/property/services. MIR = later of this and invoice_received_date.

sb_15day_certified.description: §179-f(2): the vendor is a small business AND identifies that it is seeking expedited payment as a small business. Necessary but NOT sufficient for the 15-day clock — electronic submission is also required (conjunctive).

submitted_electronically.description: §179-f(2): the invoice was submitted electronically in conformance with the state accounting/financial-management system. The second required conjunct of the 15-day small-business clock.

highway_final_payment.description: §179-f(2)/§179-e(6)(c): final payment on a highway construction contract (75-day branch; MIR receipt date set by Highway Law §38(7)(g)).

cert_just_true_correct.description: §109 attestation concept: the statement is 'just, true and correct'. Used by the §109 semantic-concept pre-flight.

cert_not_previously_paid.description: §109 attestation concept: 'no part thereof has been paid' (not previously paid).

cert_actually_due_owing.description: §109 attestation concept: 'the balance therein stated is actually due and owing'.

status.description: Categorical invoice status (engine/invoice_status.py). Gate: DRAFT -> PREFLIGHT_PASS / PREFLIGHT_FLAG.

preflight_verdict.description: Categorical RM-5 pre-flight verdict string (set by the existing validator), if run.
